page: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a virtual machine within the Cloud GPU family, featuring an Intel x86_64 architecture with 24 shared vCPUs. The system is equipped with 120.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 5.0 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is delivered via a single NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 48 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage consists of a 1400 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

A key architectural tradeoff of this instance is the shared CPU allocation model, which may introduce CPU scheduling latency or variable compute performance under heavy host load. However, this is balanced by the inclusion of a dedicated enterprise-grade NVIDIA A40 GPU and a substantial 120.0 GB memory footprint. This configuration offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-intensive workloads that require massive VRAM and system memory but do not demand constant, dedicated physical CPU cores.

This server configuration is designed for workloads such as large language model inference, deep learning training, data science pipelines, and complex 3D rendering tasks. The 48 GB of VRAM combined with 120.0 GB of system memory and fast NVMe storage supports large datasets and model weights, making it suitable for AI development, batch processing, and GPU-accelerated analytics.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a Cloud GPU virtual server configured with 24 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs, 120.0 GB of system memory, and a 1400 GB NVMe SSD. The primary accelerator is a single NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU featuring 48 GB of VRAM. While the shared CPU allocation introduces potential performance variability under high host CPU contention, the high system memory capacity of 5.0 GB per core and the massive GPU frame buffer provide a balanced platform for memory-heavy graphics and compute tasks. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require substantial GPU resources without the premium cost of dedicated CPU cores. It is optimized for deep learning inference, data science, 3D rendering, and GPU-accelerated data processing.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 24 shared Intel vCPUs, 120 GB of RAM, a 1400 GB NVMe SSD, and one NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 48 GB of VRAM for accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a40-24c-120g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server with 24 shared Intel vCPUs, 120 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A40 GPU with 48 GB VRAM.
tagline: An accelerator-focused virtual server combining a 48 GB GPU with substantial system memory and high-speed NVMe storage for complex workloads.
bullet_points: NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 48 GB of dedicated VRAM
24 shared Intel x86_64 vCPUs with 120.0 GB system memory
1400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Shared CPU allocation offering qualitative cost efficiency for GPU-heavy tasks
Suited for deep learning inference, data science, and 3D rendering
